recommendations.title: A Quiet Passion
recommendations.overview: The story of American poet Emily Dickinson from her early days as a young schoolgirl to her later years as a reclusive, unrecognized artist.

recommendations.title: The Deep Blue Sea
recommendations.overview: The wife of a British Judge is caught in a self-destructive love affair with a Royal Air Force pilot.

recommendations.title: The Long Day Closes

recommendations.title: Braveheart

recommendations.title: King Richard
recommendations.overview: The story of how Richard Williams served as a coach to his daughters Venus and Serena, who will soon become two of the most legendary tennis players in history.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: Gods

recommendations.title: Suffragette
recommendations.overview: Based on true events about the foot soldiers of the early feminist movement, women who were forced underground to pursue a dangerous game of cat and mouse with an increasingly brutal State.
